title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.200 - Copies from United States land offices
text:
490.200.  Copies from United States land offices. — Copies of any entry or entries, or memoranda, made on the books of the office of any register or receiver of any United States land office, certified by the said register or receiver to be correct, shall be received in evidence in the trial of any cause in any of the courts of this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 1822) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1658; 1919 § 5345; 1909 § 6290
